hero.desc: Bring back thicker-looking hair with doctor-guided mesotherapy in the heart of Kuala Lumpur

whatIs.title: What is hair mesotherapy?
whatIs.desc: A minimally invasive treatment that injects a tailored mix of nutrients into the scalp at 2-4mm depth to nourish follicles and support healthier growth.
whatIs.b1: Delivers nutrients closer to the follicles
whatIs.b4: Improves hair quality and thickness over time

benefits.title: Why choose hair mesotherapy?
benefits.desc: A gentle, effective approach to hair restoration that fits your lifestyle
benefits.b1Desc: Minimally invasive with no downtime, perfect for busy KL professionals
benefits.b2Desc: Gradual improvement that looks and feels natural
benefits.b3Desc: MOH registered clinic with personalized treatment plans
benefits.b4Desc: Direct nutrient delivery to thinning areas
benefits.b5Desc: 30-45 minute treatments that fit your schedule
benefits.b6Desc: Improves overall scalp condition and circulation

journey.title: Your Journey at Nexus Clinic
journey.desc: A simple, comfortable process from assessment to results
journey.s1Desc: Doctor-led evaluation of your hair loss pattern and scalp health
journey.s2Desc: Local anaesthetic applied for a comfortable experience
journey.s3Desc: Precise nutrient delivery to targeted thinning zones

pricing.title: Investment in Your Hair
pricing.p1Desc: Perfect for maintenance or trying the treatment

faq.a1: Yes, especially for early thinning. It delivers nutrients directly to the scalp and supports follicle function. Results are gradual, with most patients noticing changes within weeks to months.
faq.q2: How many sessions do I need?
faq.a2: Most plans start with 4-6 sessions initially, followed by maintenance every 1-3 months depending on your specific case and response to treatment.
faq.a3: Most patients describe it as mild pinching or pressure. We apply local anaesthetic to ensure your comfort throughout the procedure.
faq.a4: Mild redness, swelling, or tenderness at injection sites are common and typically resolve within a few days.
faq.a5: Results are gradual. Most patients notice improved quality and thickness within weeks to a few months of starting treatment.
